title: Kill Count
description: Track your kills in chat — resets on death and stays separate per server.
body:
# ☠ Kill Counter

A lightweight kill tracker available as both a **Fabric mod** and a **Paper plugin**.

---

## ✨ Features
- 💬 **Chat notification** on every kill — shows `☠ Kill #1`, `☠ Kill #2`, etc.
- 💀 **Resets on death** — your streak goes back to 0 when you die
- 🌐 **Per-server** — each server starts fresh, counts don't carry over
- ⚡ **Private** — only you see your kill count

---

## 📖 How it works
Just play normally. Every time you kill a mob or player, a message appears
in your chat showing your current kill count. When you die, the counter resets
and you start again from 0.

---

## 🧩 Versions

| Version | Type | Works on |
|---------|------|----------|
| Fabric Mod | Client-side | Any server, no mod needed |
| Paper Plugin | Server-side | Paper 1.21 — 1.21.11 |

---

## 📌 Setup

**Fabric:** Minecraft 1.21.11 · Fabric Loader 0.19.2+ · Fabric API

**Paper:** Paper 1.21 — 1.21.11 · Java 21+

---

## 🔗 More
Visit my website: [noam2509s-mods.vercel.app](https://noam2509s-mods.vercel.app)
